purpose: Record the boundary comparing the canonical sparse anchor-and-reverse law against the shared-column single-relation witness.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This records a comparison boundary between two 120-record carrier laws.
Comparison is not source-native WXYZTI generation.
No independent witness layer is proven.

summary.anchor_reverse_source_reading: anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records
summary.anchor_reverse_combined_meaning: within an anchor bucket, vary outgoing two-step records; by reversal, move the anchor to the opposite endpoint; repeat
summary.terminal_reason: Anchor-and-reverse is retained as the canonical sparse law because it is sparser and source-facing; shared_column is retained as the faster single-relation witness. Both remain 120-record carrier laws, not full G900.

boundary_record.short_form: Anchor-and-reverse is canonical; shared-column is the faster single-relation witness.
keeper_lines: Anchor-and-reverse is the canonical sparse law.
Shared-column is the faster single-relation witness.
shared_B plus reverse_partner is sparser and source-facing.
shared_column reaches full exposure faster but is denser.
Both settle to the admitted four.
positive_results: shared_B plus reverse_partner was retained as the canonical sparse law.
shared_column was retained as the preferred single-relation witness.
shared_column reaches full exposure one shell earlier.
Both laws settle to the admitted four.
negative_results: No full 900-state return cycle was found.
No independent witness layer was found.
No full G900 admission was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call either law full G900.
Do not call either law Gap A closure.
Do not call either law an independent witness layer.
Do not treat faster exposure as stronger source meaning.
allowed_next_work: Search for an independent witness layer over the anchor-and-reverse carrier.
Search for a 900-state lift from anchor-and-reverse transport.
Use shared_column as a comparison witness in future audits.
Return to WXYZTI generator derivation with anchor-and-reverse as a constraint.

interpretation.main_result: The branch now has a canonical sparse law and an alternate single-relation witness.
interpretation.canonical_law: shared_B plus reverse_partner, read as anchor-and-reverse transport.
interpretation.why_anchor_reverse_wins: It is sparser, source-facing, row/support-free, and semantically explicit.
interpretation.why_shared_column_matters: It is a clean single-relation witness and reaches the full 120-record background faster.
interpretation.why_not_closure: Both are 120-record source-shell carrier laws, not full G900, not independent witness, and not the WXYZTI generator.
interpretation.next_move: Search for an independent witness layer or a 900-state lift from anchor-and-reverse transport.

claim.short_form: Anchor-and-reverse is canonical; shared-column is the faster single-relation witness.
claim.not_closed_reason: Both are 120-record source-shell carrier laws, not full G900, not independent witness, and not the WXYZTI generator.
claim.next_problem: Search for an independent witness layer or a 900-state lift from anchor-and-reverse transport.
